'; h+='

SPPG Gantarangkeke 1

'+new Date().toLocaleDateString('id-ID',{day:'2-digit',month:'long',year:'numeric'})+'

'; if(type==='dashboard'){h+='

Ringkasan Sekolah

';SCHOOLS.forEach(s=>{h+='';});h+='
SekolahJenjangK1-3K4-6Total
'+s.nm+''+s.jnj+''+s.k13+''+s.k46+''+totSiswa(s)+'
';} if(type==='ompreng'){h+='

Distribusi Ompreng

';Object.entries(distribHarian).sort((a,b)=>b[0].localeCompare(a[0])).forEach(([dt,d])=>{h+='';});h+='
TanggalK1-3K4-6TotalAnggaranKet
'+fmtDate(dt)+''+d.k13+''+d.k46+''+d.total+''+fmtRp((d.k13||0)*8000+(d.k46||0)*10000)+''+d.ket+'
';} if(type==='kehadiran'){h+='

Kehadiran Siswa

';SCHOOLS.forEach(s=>{var d=kehadiranData[s.id]||{hadir:0};var t=totSiswa(s)||1;h+='';});h+='
SekolahHadirTotal% Hadir
'+s.nm+''+d.hadir+''+totSiswa(s)+''+Math.round(d.hadir/t*1000)/10+'%
';} if(type==='prestasi'){h+='

Prestasi Siswa

';SCHOOLS.forEach(s=>{var d=prestasiData[s.id]||{akademik:0,nonAkademik:0,karakter:0};h+='';});h+='
SekolahAkademikNon-AkademikKarakterTotal
'+s.nm+''+(d.akademik||0)+''+(d.nonAkademik||0)+''+(d.karakter||0)+''+((d.akademik||0)+(d.nonAkademik||0)+(d.karakter||0))+'
';} h+=''; var w=window.open('','_blank');if(w){w.document.write(h);w.document.close();w.print();} } // Global error handler window.addEventListener('error',function(e){console.error('App error:',e.message);}); window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(e){console.error('Promise error:',e.reason);}); document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){ var lp=$('p'); if(lp)lp.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')doLogin();}); var lu=$('u'); if(lu)lu.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter'){var pf=$('p');if(pf)pf.focus();}}); var sess=getSession(); if(sess){ window._mbgKey=sess.key; var tb=document.querySelector('#app .tb-title h1'); if(tb&&sess.nmSppg)tb.textContent=esc(sess.nmSppg); var ddNm=$('ddName');if(ddNm)ddNm.textContent=esc(sess.nmAdmin||sess.user||''); var avInit=$('avInit');if(avInit)avInit.textContent=(sess.nmAdmin||sess.user||'A')[0].toUpperCase(); $('auth').style.display='none'; $('app').classList.add('show'); startSessionTimer(); var loaded=loadLS();initData();initAll(); var lastPage=sess.lastPage||sessionStorage.getItem('mbg_lastpage')||'dashboard'; setTimeout(function(){go(lastPage);},80); if(loaded)toast('Selamat datang kembali!'); } });

Daftar Akun SPPG

Buat akun untuk SPPG Anda

Setiap SPPG mendapat akun & data terpisah. Tersimpan di browser Anda.

Data tersimpan di browser ini. Gunakan browser & perangkat yang sama untuk login.
